roles.name: Town Visionary
roles.description: The big-picture dreamer — designs the entire town's vision and watches over its dramatic integrity.

roles.name: Motel Manager
roles.description: Keeps the rooms booked, the timeline tight, and the front desk staffed — answers to the family.

roles.name: Front Desk Steward
roles.description: Master of the ledger, the layouts, and the keys behind the counter.

roles.name: Apothecary Builder
roles.description: Crafts bespoke Apex and LWC potions on the storefront shelves.

roles.name: Senior Apothecary
roles.description: Most-experienced builder — sets the brand standards for every artisanal Apex blend.

roles.name: Practice Lead of the Café Tropical
roles.description: Captain of the Salesforce craft — leads senior consultants the way Twyla leads the brunch rush.

roles.name: Cabaret Senior Choreographer
roles.description: Patrols requirements with practiced craft — translates client intent to the stage.

roles.name: Cabaret Stagehand
roles.description: Carries discovery, configuration, and prop placement under the choreographer's eye.

roles.name: Junior Cabaret Stagehand
roles.description: First-time stagehand learning the ropes — small builds under close mentorship.

roles.name: Bridge-Master of the General Store
roles.description: Architect of the great spans between Salesforce and every aisle of the legacy store.

roles.name: Senior Crow Wrangler
roles.description: Lays the API stones, middleware, and the events that fly between systems.

roles.name: Junior Crow Wrangler
roles.description: Learns the craft of integration — webhooks, batch, and graceful error handling.

roles.name: Wig Quality Inspector
roles.description: Tends the wardrobe and finds the maladies in the build before opening night.

roles.name: Herald of Rose Apothecary
roles.description: Lifts the brand banner — leads all marketing craft for the boutique apothecary line.

roles.name: Senior Brand Stylist
roles.description: Strategist of campaigns — sounds the call to gather and convert the boutique crowd.

roles.name: Brand Stylist
roles.description: Carries the campaign forward — content, creative, and the daily aesthetic upkeep.

roles.name: Council Scribe of Town Hall
roles.description: Records what is needed and what is promised — translates between residents and the build team.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every realm starts at least one month in the past — past weeks get Time Entries (Step 6), future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set.

realms.projectName: Rosebud Motel — Front Desk Operations Platform

rosebud-motel-staff.themedRole: Practice Lead of the Café Tropical

rose-family.name: Bébé, You Got This
rose-family.description: Discovery sign-off — Moira blesses the project with a single tear.

rose-family.name: Hand-Milled Soap Forging
rose-family.description: Build kickoff: artisanal soap line goes into production.

rose-family.name: Family Council Audit
rose-family.description: Mid-project gate: Johnny reviews the receipts at the dinner table.

rose-family.name: Sample Sale Invoice
rose-family.description: Phase invoice trigger: pop-up event at the General Store.

rose-family.name: Apothecary Grand Opening
rose-family.description: Go-Live: ribbon cut, David and Patrick at the till.

rose-family.name: Hyper-Care Hand-Off
rose-family.description: Hand-off: Patrick takes day-to-day; David handles aesthetics.

rosebud-motel-staff.name: Welcome Pamphlet Printing
rosebud-motel-staff.description: Project kickoff: Stevie unlocks the front desk for discovery.

rosebud-motel-staff.name: Booking Engine Wiring
rosebud-motel-staff.description: Build phase: room availability live, no more sticky-note ledger.

rosebud-motel-staff.name: Continental Breakfast UAT
rosebud-motel-staff.description: UAT gate: muffins ordered, coffee tested, guests surveyed.

rosebud-motel-staff.name: Peak Season Go-Live
rosebud-motel-staff.description: Go-Live: bookings flow during reunion weekend.

rosebud-motel-staff.name: Roland's Mayoral Hand-Off
rosebud-motel-staff.description: Hyper-care close: ops handed back to Stevie and Roland.

rosebud-motel-staff.name: Final Invoice from the Lobby
rosebud-motel-staff.description: Final invoice issued from the front desk.

town-residents.name: Council Convenes
town-residents.description: Discovery: Mayor Roland gavels the kickoff in town hall.

town-residents.name: Civic Portal Build-Out
town-residents.description: Build: permits and bylaws online for the first time.

town-residents.name: Mayor's Audit
town-residents.description: Solution review with Roland — somehow involves chili.

town-residents.name: Asphalt Festival Go-Live
town-residents.description: Go-Live: portal handles the festival registration rush.

town-residents.name: Town Records Stabilization
town-residents.description: Project close: legacy ledgers retired, new records in flight.

town-residents.name: Final Town Reckoning
town-residents.description: Final invoice from the Mayor's office.

cabaret-and-orbit.name: Auditions Open
cabaret-and-orbit.description: Kickoff: Moira posts notices on every lamppost in town.

cabaret-and-orbit.name: Wig Wall Inventory
cabaret-and-orbit.description: Discovery: every wig catalogued by name and personality.

cabaret-and-orbit.name: Set Construction Complete
cabaret-and-orbit.description: Build: Berlin cabaret backdrop assembled in the town hall.

cabaret-and-orbit.name: Dress Rehearsal Sign-Off
cabaret-and-orbit.description: UAT acceptance: Moira approves with a single dramatic exhale.

cabaret-and-orbit.name: Opening Night
cabaret-and-orbit.description: Go-Live + handoff: Cabaret opens to a packed house.

cabaret-and-orbit.name: Encore Invoice
cabaret-and-orbit.description: Final invoice from the Cabaret Society.

Johnny Rose.notes: Pitching motel franchise to a former Video Planet contact.

Moira Rose.notes: Sunrise Bay reunion shoot — quote: 'Bébé, I must.'

David Rose.notes: Sourcing artisanal goat milk from a farmer in Elmdale.

Alexis Rose.notes: Networking event — 'Ew, David, it's for work.'

Stevie Budd.notes: Solo road trip — needed a reset, ate a lot of pretzels.

Roland Schitt.notes: Mayoral conference in Elm Glen — bringing his own snacks.

Mutt Schitt.notes: Off-grid in his cabin — no phone, no problem.

Patrick Brewer.notes: Visiting his parents — bringing David, with mixed feelings.

Ted Mullens.notes: Veterinary research expedition to the Galápagos.

Twyla Sands.notes: Lottery winnings paperwork — keeping it casual.

Bob Currie.notes: Bob's Garage inventory week — counting every last fan belt.
